description: Update the Apple Inc (AAPL) security in the portfolio file at /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/investment_portfolio.xml by importing historical quotes from /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/aapl_historical_quotes.csv. The CSV file uses a semicolon (;) delimiter and contains Date and Quote columns for daily closing prices from January to June 2024. Save the updated portfolio file.
